questions.text: What model and brand of 3D printer are you using?
How did the final 3D print come out?
Is there software where you can type in words and it generates the anamorphic design automatically?
Will you be covering local codes or national codes, or both?
How long has construction been going on since it started?
Is this market rate or LIHTC housing?
Do you work on LEED projects?
Why aren't tilt-and-turn windows standard in the US?
Is this Revit plugin compatible with the UK version of Revit?
Are you encountering sensitive conversations when using the AI notetaker in professional settings?
What are the fix options when framing or structural work is done wrong on site?
As an architect, are you allowed to size beams or is that an engineer's role?
Do you ever see single houses built out of steel framing?
Does the 3D scanning tool scan your head to create the bust?
Can green walls and brick architecture work together effectively?
How do you handle a situation where a code official claims you are refusing to submit something?
Where does this architect rank on the difficulty spectrum for the profession?
What happens with the anchor bolts when construction is delayed years?
Would you make a book about NIA or Black architectural history available to the public?

requests.text: Keep the building codes series going
Do a video or series on more Black architects, specifically ones not yet covered
Do a deeper video on the ACT-SO competition and how young people can get involved
Show a plans vs. reality comparison for the construction project
Make the Revit-to-3D-print tool publicly available or open for more testers
Cover Louis A. S. Bellinger and the New Granada Theater
Create a series giving an architecture 101 overview for non-architects
Post more content about Revit workflows and tools
Do a video on the scope of work an architect can legally do across different states
Cover zoning code nuances in more depth

audience_conversation_themes.theme: Appreciation for Black architect history and representation
Building codes: practical questions and requests for more content
3D printing process: technical tips, troubleshooting and curiosity

Diversity, equity and access in the architecture profession
NIA platform and resource sharing interest
Youth pipeline and educational pathways into architecture
